ddls:
CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist on the music streaming platform */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the playlist */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Whether the playlist is public or private */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the playlist has been played */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the playlist has been shared */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who produced the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album to which the track belongs */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "lyrics_url" TEXT /* URL to the lyrics of the track */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the track contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the track has been played */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes the track has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "follow_count" INTEGER /* Total number of followers the artist has */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the artist's tracks have been played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "album_cover" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the album */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the album has been played */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes the album has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on the album */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, subscriber) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "follow_count" INTEGER /* Total number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Total number of users the user is following */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the user has played tracks */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes the user has given */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments the user has posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the playlist or track */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist being accessed */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, listen) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user at the time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_attributes" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)
